# Emphant Studio v0.1.0

Emphant Studio v0.1.0 is the first open-source release of the project. This version introduces a local-first desktop AI workspace built with Tauri 2, React, TypeScript, Redux Toolkit, Ant Design, and Rust.

This release focuses on establishing the core desktop workbench experience: conversations, assistant selection, agents, skills, local files, knowledge bases, notes, todos, profile settings, and provider/tool configuration.

## Downloads

Release assets are built for the following platforms:

- Windows x86_64
- macOS Apple Silicon
- Linux x86_64
- Linux ARM64

These initial community builds are unsigned. Windows and macOS may show security prompts when opening the app.

## Highlights

- Tauri 2 desktop application shell.
- React and TypeScript renderer powered by Vite.
- Route-based workspace pages for chat, agents, skills, files, knowledge, notes, todos, profile, and settings.
- Multi-topic AI chat workspace with assistant selection and structured message blocks.
- Provider and tool configuration screens for AI-assisted workflows.
- Markdown rendering with GitHub Flavored Markdown and syntax highlighting.
- Shared workspace package for cross-app constants and TypeScript types.
- MIT-licensed open-source distribution.

## Notes

This is an early development release. APIs, storage formats, desktop behavior, and packaging details may change in future versions.

## Source

The source code is available under the MIT License.
